title: crataegus monogyna var. intermedia
intro: Crataegus monogyna var. intermedia, also known as mid-way hawthorn, is a plant species that is a hybrid of the common hawthorn (Crataegus monogyna) and a subspecies of hawthorn (Crataegus monogyna var. monogyna). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to promote cardiovascular health by reducing blood pressure, improving blood lipid profiles, and strengthening the heart. The plant is rich in flavonoids, oligomeric proanthocyanidin complexes, and other bioactive compounds that contribute to its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and protecting against cardiovascular disease. Crataegus monogyna var. intermedia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
